message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

package "exercise3" {
    class GameLogic
    class BoardPrinter
    class WinCondition
    class Board
    class Move
    class Piece
    enum Player

    package "movevalidator" {
        interface MoveValidator
        class MoveIsForward
        class MoveLength
        class MoveIsDiagonal
        class OpponentPieceBetweenJump
        class StartPieceValid
        class TargetFieldEmpty
        class NoOtherJumpMovePossible
    }

    GameLogic ..> BoardPrinter
    GameLogic ..> Board
    GameLogic ..> Move
    GameLogic ..> Piece
    GameLogic ..> Player
    GameLogic ..> WinCondition
    GameLogic ==> MoveValidator

    WinCondition ..> Board
    WinCondition ..> Player

    MoveIsForward ..|> MoveValidator
    MoveLength ..|> MoveValidator
    MoveIsDiagonal ..|> MoveValidator
    OpponentPieceBetweenJump ..|> MoveValidator
    StartPieceValid ..|> MoveValidator
    TargetFieldEmpty ..|> MoveValidator
    NoOtherJumpMovePossible ..|> MoveValidator

    MoveIsForward ..> Move
    MoveIsForward ..> Piece
    MoveLength ..> Move
    MoveIsDiagonal ..> Move
    OpponentPieceBetweenJump ..> Board
    OpponentPieceBetweenJump ..> Move
    OpponentPieceBetweenJump ..> Piece
    StartPieceValid ..> Board
    StartPieceValid ..> Move
    StartPieceValid ..> Player
    TargetFieldEmpty ..> Board
    TargetFieldEmpty ..> Move
    NoOtherJumpMovePossible ..> Board
    NoOtherJumpMovePossible ..> Player
    NoOtherJumpMovePossible ..> MoveValidator
}

@enduml
```
